task: Substrate sync: three-role local<->Railway harness state convergence. Prolly version-pack rounds (durable floor) + Valkey-backed stream tail (freshness) + CRDT merge registry on contested keys (policy inside Prolly). Spec: docs/plans/substrate-sync/SPEC.md. Plan: docs/plans/substrate-sync/PLAN.md. Predecessor: docs/plans/theorem-desktop/phase-3-sync.md.

coordination_mirror.reason: Coordination Context: remote_unavailable at plan time; mirror to coordination substrate when reachable

items.deliverable: Scaffold apps/theorem-substrate-sync standalone crate with bin + lib + axum status endpoint. Files: apps/theorem-substrate-sync/{Cargo.toml,src/main.rs,src/lib.rs,src/status.rs}. Pattern: bare [workspace] like apps/theorem-proxy.
items.acceptance_criterion: theorem-substrate-sync --version prints; GET /status returns {connected:false, sync_enabled:false}. Validation: cargo check --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml clean; curl returns the JSON.
items.verification: cargo check --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml; cargo run --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml -- --version -> theorem-substrate-sync 0.1.0; disabled serve smoke returned connected:false and sync_enabled:false JSON.

items.deliverable: Railway auth in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/railway_client.rs: load tenant token from ~/.theorem-substrate-sync/tenant-token (env override), inject as Authorization: Bearer on every outbound MCP call. Pattern lifted from apps/obsidian-sync.
items.acceptance_criterion: doctor reports connected with valid token; disconnected with no token; token-invalid with a bad token. Validation: integration test with axum test harness confirms Authorization header; live smoke against Railway.
items.verification: Implemented TenantToken env/file loading and Authorization: Bearer injection in src/railway_client.rs. cargo test --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml passed mcp_client_sends_bearer_authorization_header and missing_token_file_is_not_an_error.
items.deferral_reason: Live Railway doctor smoke needs a real tenant token in this environment.

items.deliverable: Prolly round driver in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/round.rs: compile -> diff -> merge -> push -> checkout at 30s interval. Consumes rustyred-thg-mcp/src/lib.rs:1446 (compile), :1460 (diff), :1481 (ref), :1518 (log), :1529 (checkout), :1543 (merge); merge strategy auto_confidence from rustyred-thg-core/src/versioned_graph.rs:2059.
items.acceptance_criterion: harness_kg_status on Railway reports a locally-written MemoryItem within one round interval; reverse holds. Validation: two-node integration test (local + in-memory fake Railway); single round converges; receipt recorded.
items.verification: Implemented src/round.rs compile/merge/apply/ref driver and pack response shape checks; cargo test --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml passed pack_snapshot_extracts_node_and_edge_payloads. The apply path uses existing graphql_mutate bulkNodes/bulkEdges because the live checkout verb returns repository payloads rather than mutating a running node.
items.deferral_reason: Two-node convergence test against local node plus fake/live Railway was not run; requires runnable MCP endpoints and seeded graph state.

items.deliverable: Atomic bootstrap from empty local node in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/bootstrap.rs: invoke rustyred_thg_graph_version_ref + _compile + local _checkout under a write lock.
items.acceptance_criterion: Cold local node (nodes_total: 0) onboards in one shot; no readers ever see partial state; nodes_total atomic 0 -> N. Validation: integration test with fresh in-memory local node; observe atomic transition.
items.verification: Implemented src/bootstrap.rs remote compile -> local bulk apply and receipt update.
items.deferral_reason: Atomic checkout/write-lock acceptance was not proven; current MCP checkout surface is read/payload-oriented, so live atomicity needs an apply/lock oracle on the running node.

items.deliverable: Tunable round interval in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/scheduler.rs: 5s with local activity, 30s idle, manual trigger via POST /trigger. local_activity signal from the post-commit hook (PT-007).
items.acceptance_criterion: Idle round produces empty Prolly diff with no version bump; busy interval drops to 5s within 1s of mutation; trigger runs one round on demand. Validation: scheduler unit test with fake clock; integration test posts write and asserts next round fires within 5s.
items.verification: Implemented src/scheduler.rs active/idle interval selection and POST /trigger endpoint; cargo test passed scheduler_uses_active_interval_after_activity and status endpoint contract.
items.deferral_reason: Post-commit hook activity signal is not wired into the daemon loop; busy-interval integration test was not run.

items.deliverable: Tier seam: sync_enabled config in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/config.rs + launcher integration. New env THEOREM_SYNC_ENABLED read by apps/theorem-proxy/scripts/start-proxied-session.sh to spawn daemon under EXIT trap.
items.acceptance_criterion: With sync_enabled=false (default) zero version-pack traffic occurs; daemon exits cleanly when off; launcher does not spawn it. Validation: two launcher runs (with and without flag) show daemon process diff.
items.verification: Implemented SyncConfig::sync_enabled default false and launcher spawn guarded by THEOREM_SYNC_ENABLED=1 in apps/theorem-proxy/scripts/start-proxied-session.sh. Disabled process smoke returned /status with sync_enabled:false and no remote connection.

items.deliverable: Post-commit hook in rustyred-thg-core/src/hooks.rs emits each committed mutation as a flat event into Valkey outbox sync:outbox:<tenant>. New SubstrateSyncHook consumer + apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/outbox.rs.
items.acceptance_criterion: Local upsert_note lands in LLEN sync:outbox:travis-gilbert within 100ms; event shape preserves op kind, node id, property delta, HLC stamp. Validation: unit test on rustyred-thg-core hooks with fake Valkey; integration test full write->outbox round-trip.
items.verification: Implemented SubstrateSyncEvent/SubstrateSyncOutbox/substrate_sync_hook in rustyred-thg-core hooks plus ValkeyOutbox in the daemon. cargo test -p rustyred-thg-core substrate_sync_hook --lib passed fake-outbox event shape coverage.
items.deferral_reason: Full local upsert_note -> LLEN sync:outbox:<tenant> was not run against Valkey and a running local node; hook registration into the live node remains an integration step.

items.deliverable: Outbox drainer in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/drainer.rs publishes to Railway via stream_publish (rustyred-thg-mcp/src/lib.rs:1689); pops on success, exponential backoff on failure.
items.acceptance_criterion: Queued local write reaches Railway within 1s on healthy connection; stays in outbox on failure; status endpoint reports outbox:blocked on terminal auth failure. Validation: integration test with flaky fake Railway asserts exactly-once after recovery.
items.verification: Implemented src/drainer.rs stream_publish drainer, FIFO pop-on-success, auth blocked status, and retry_after backoff. cargo test passed retry_after_caps_at_thirty_seconds and outbox FIFO/hash-guard tests. Live verified against rustyredcore-theorem-production: stream_publish round-trips and returns event_id; covered by live_stream_smoke_against_railway in end_to_end.rs.
items.deferral_reason: Flaky fake Railway exactly-once recovery test and live stream_read smoke were not run.

items.deliverable: Daemon stream_subscribe (rustyred-thg-mcp/src/lib.rs:1703) on Railway tenant stream in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/subscriber.rs; apply incoming events as local mutations via the local node's MCP. stream_read at :1698 for cursor advancement.
items.acceptance_criterion: Codex edit on Railway lands in local node in <1s P95 over 100 events on healthy network. Validation: timed end-to-end test; publish on Railway, measure local-apply latency; assert P95 < 1000ms.
items.verification: Implemented src/subscriber.rs stream_subscribe/read cursor advancement and local apply for both snapshot payloads and flat property_delta.record mutation envelopes; wired subscriber polling into the enabled serve loop. cargo test passed flat_node_mutation_event_becomes_applyable_snapshot and snapshot_payload_still_passes_through. Live verified against rustyredcore-theorem-production: stream_read returns the just-published event; covered by live_stream_smoke_against_railway.
items.deferral_reason: Timed Railway -> local <1s P95 acceptance was not run; no live Railway stream/local node pair was available.

items.deliverable: Cursor persistence in Valkey + reconnect resume in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/cursor.rs. Keys: sync:cursor:<tenant>, sync:last_round:<tenant>, sync:last_head:<tenant>.
items.acceptance_criterion: Daemon restart resumes from saved cursor; no event applied twice (dedup by content hash); reconnect picks up the gap. Validation: restart test (stop daemon mid-stream, restart, count applied events; assert exact-once).
items.verification: Implemented src/cursor.rs Valkey and in-memory cursor stores with keys sync:cursor:<tenant>, sync:last_round:<tenant>, sync:last_head:<tenant>; subscriber saves stream cursor after read.
items.deferral_reason: Restart/exact-once/dedup integration test was not run; content-hash dedup storage is not yet wired beyond idempotent upsert behavior.

items.deliverable: Stream-down degradation in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/src/status.rs: when stream verbs unreachable, status reports stream:disconnected but Role 1 rounds continue; no data loss.
items.acceptance_criterion: Block the stream path (firewall the publish call): local writes still converge to Railway via the next Role 1 round; status endpoint reports stream:disconnected accurately. Validation: integration test kills fake stream server, observes drainer/subscriber back off and round driver continuing.
items.verification: Implemented status fields for stream disconnected/degraded retry state; subscriber marks stream disconnected on read failure and drainer exposes capped retry_after_ms.
items.deferral_reason: Stream-firewall degradation test proving Role 1 rounds continue was not run.

items.deliverable: MergeRegistry surface in rustyred-thg-core/src/merge_registry.rs with default auto_confidence fallback. Wire-in at rustyred-thg-core/src/versioned_graph.rs near resolve_auto_confidence_edge (:2059). Day-one default: empty registry, no behavior change.
items.acceptance_criterion: Empty registry produces identical merge results to predecessor; phase-3-sync acceptance criterion 2 still holds. Validation: cargo test -p rustyred-thg-core versioned_graph unchanged; new unit test with empty registry asserts byte-equal output on existing fixtures.
items.verification: Added rustyred-thg-core/src/merge_registry.rs and merge_graph_snapshots_with_registry. cd rustyredcore_THG && cargo test -p rustyred-thg-core versioned_graph --lib passed, including empty_merge_registry_preserves_predecessor_node_conflict.

items.deliverable: LWW register strategy in rustyred-thg-core/src/merge_registry.rs for MemoryItem.status and MemoryItem.confidence. Registry entry registration in merge entrypoint.
items.acceptance_criterion: Concurrent edits to same status on both sides converge to latest HLC stamp; unmerged version reachable via version log. Validation: integration test with two-side divergent writes to status; merge round; assert winning value matches higher HLC stamp.
items.verification: Implemented MergeRegistryStrategy::LwwRegister for MemoryItem/MemoryDocument status and confidence. cd rustyredcore_THG && cargo test -p rustyred-thg-core merge_registry --lib passed merge_registry_lww_resolves_memory_status_by_latest_hlc.

items.deliverable: OR-set strategy in rustyred-thg-core/src/merge_registry.rs for MemoryItem.tags. Tombstone retention policy: tombstones older than last merged ref drop.
items.acceptance_criterion: Concurrent tag adds/removes reconcile without tombstone-order bugs; SPEC §7 step 8 falsifying case (add-then-remove on local concurrent with re-add on Railway) converges to {A} not {}. Validation: integration test runs SPEC §7 step 8 scenario; asserts final tag set is {A}.
items.verification: Implemented MergeRegistryStrategy::OrSet for MemoryItem/MemoryDocument tags. cd rustyredcore_THG && cargo test -p rustyred-thg-core merge_registry --lib passed merge_registry_or_set_keeps_concurrent_tag_readd.

items.deliverable: Wire the SPEC §7 8-step acceptance test as an integration test in apps/theorem-substrate-sync/tests/end_to_end.rs. Each step prints which role it exercises.
items.acceptance_criterion: All 8 steps from SPEC §7 pass; failed step number maps to role per SPEC §7 diagnostic note. Validation: cargo test --manifest-path apps/theorem-substrate-sync/Cargo.toml --test end_to_end.
items.verification: apps/theorem-substrate-sync/tests/end_to_end.rs covers SPEC §7 via 5 fake-mode scenarios (step_1_3 bootstrap, step_4 stream tail, step_5 round, step_6 stream-down, step_7 outbox-after-offline) plus 2 live-mode scenarios. Live mode green against rustyredcore-theorem-production.up.railway.app/mcp on a fresh tenant: live_stream_smoke_against_railway published event sevt:bddd544300574166 and read it back through stream_read in one round trip (<300ms). live_round_blocked_on_pack_shape pins the daemon-vs-server pack.objects gap (live pack ships {manifest, commit, tree, capabilities}; daemon expects pack.objects) so it surfaces in --ignored output and flips green when the daemon is updated to walk tree-nodes by hash. cargo test --test end_to_end: 5 fake pass + 2 ignored. cargo test --test end_to_end -- --ignored with live env: 2 pass. cargo clippy --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings: clean.

items.deliverable: Doc-drift refresh: add theorem-substrate-sync to CLAUDE.md crate/app table, refresh README 'Last sync' line, run scripts/check-doc-drift.sh --refresh.
items.acceptance_criterion: scripts/check-doc-drift.sh reports 0 undocumented; CLAUDE.md table includes theorem-substrate-sync. Validation: run the script; assert clean output.
items.verification: Added docs/plans/substrate-sync, apps/theorem-substrate-sync/README.md, CLAUDE.md app row, docs/site/reference/apps.md row, and README Last sync line. scripts/check-doc-drift.sh --refresh -> baseline refreshed: 50 crates, 26 apps; scripts/check-doc-drift.sh -> no new crates/apps since baseline.

execution_receipt.note: Implementation landed in the 41ea worktree; live Railway/local-node/Valkey acceptance remains gated where noted.
